title: webhook — Artisan commands
description: 8 commands total (7 from stackra reference + rotation-grace-cleanup).

commands.purpose: Print WebhookSubscription rows. Filterable by state, tenant, destination.
Print the WebhookDestinationRegistry contents. Shows registered drivers + their requiresConfig schemas.
Force-retry a WebhookDelivery. Refused when state=delivered (already delivered) or state=cancelled (subscription paused/disabled). Increments attempt_number.
CLI equivalent of the tenant rotate-secret endpoint. Prints the NEW secret to stdout once (never stored plaintext). Ops-only — requires super_admin permission.
Send a synthetic webhook.test event to the subscription's destination. Useful for smoke-testing configuration.
Health probe. Runs WebhookProbeJob synchronously or dispatches for background execution. --tenant / --subscription scope the probe.
Hard-delete deliveries older than prune_after_days. --dry-run reports counts without deleting.
Clear expired secret_previous columns. Runs from schedule hourly + can be invoked manually after mass-rotation events.
